title: 2012 Press Releases

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This source is a chronological index page listing all Federal Reserve press releases from 2012, including monetary policy statements, enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory guidance, and other announcements. The page itself contains no substantive research content—only titles and dates linking to individual documents. Published in 2012, this is a historical archive listing (approximately 14 years stale relative to TODAY).
key_points: This is a listing/archive page, not an archiveable substantive document
Lists mixed content types: FOMC statements, enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory proposals, stress test announcements
Published date: 2012 (14 years before TODAY); classified as historical record
Contains references to multiple macro-relevant items including FOMC statements (12/12/2012, 10/24/2012), dollar liquidity swap extensions, and stress testing scenarios
Individual items would need to be extracted and archived separately for usable content
why_it_matters: This page serves only as an index to 2012 Federal Reserve communications. It cannot be used directly for research as it contains no substantive content beyond titles and dates. Individual press releases would need to be crawled and archived separately.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source metadata - must be rejected per Rule 5
No substantive content - only titles and dates linking to individual documents
Contains mixed content types requiring disambiguation
Individual items need separate archival processing

notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This is a listing page (listing_page) containing only titles and dates of 2012 Federal Reserve press releases. The source has no substantive content to extract. Published in 2012 (14 years before TODAY), making it stale for current research. Individual FOMC statements, rate decisions, or policy releases from 2012 would need to be retrieved and archived separately if needed for historical analysis. Recommend reviewing source_type and target mismatch - TARGET is 'macro catalysts' but this page is an index, not a macro catalyst document.
